name: sf-manifest-cli
description: Interactive CLI to build Salesforce package.xml / destructiveChanges.xml by searching and selecting local metadata, then deploy with full test-level control.

scripts.test: node test/store.test.mjs && node test/session.test.mjs && node test/orgflow.test.mjs && node test/metadata.test.mjs && node test/prompt.test.mjs && node test/tui-smoke.mjs && node test/tui-guards.test.mjs && node test/tui-cursor.test.mjs && node test/tui-typeahead.test.mjs && node test/tui-toggle.test.mjs && node test/tui-help.test.mjs && node test/tui-confirm.test.mjs && node test/tui-splash.test.mjs && node test/tui-runtests.test.mjs && node test/tui-perf.test.mjs && node test/startup.test.mjs
